formulas.name: GROUP BY Clause
formulas.formula: Used to group the result-set by one or more columns
formulas.notes: Use to group rows that have the same values in a particular column(s)

formulas.name: HAVING Clause
formulas.variables: Conditions to filter the grouped result-set
formulas.notes: Use to filter grouped rows that meet a certain condition

formulas.name: Aggregate Functions
formulas.formula: Used to perform calculations on a set of values
formulas.variables: Functions such as SUM, AVG, MAX, MIN, COUNT
formulas.notes: Use to perform calculations such as sum, average, maximum, minimum, and count

formulas.name: GROUPING SETS
formulas.notes: Use to specify multiple groups for the result-set

formulas.name: ROLLUP
formulas.formula: Used to generate aggregate values for all levels of grouping
formulas.notes: Use to generate aggregate values for all levels of grouping

formulas.name: CUBE
formulas.formula: Used to generate aggregate values for all possible combinations of grouping
formulas.notes: Use to generate aggregate values for all possible combinations of grouping

formulas.name: GROUP BY with ORDER BY
formulas.formula: Used to sort the result-set after grouping
formulas.notes: Use to sort the result-set after grouping
